---
title: " "
output:
bookdown::html_document2:
toc: true
toc_float: true
number_sections: true
self_contained: false
fontsize: 11pt
pkgdown:
as_is: true
vignette: >
%\VignetteIndexEntry{Genetic Analysis Analysis}
%\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
%\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
-------------------------

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
set.seed(0)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.width = 8,
  fig.height = 8,
  out.extra = 'style="display:block; margin:auto"',
  dev = "CairoPNG"
)
```

```{r gap_incl, echo=FALSE}
url <- "https://jinghuazhao.github.io/R/vignettes/gaawr2.html"
if (identical(Sys.getenv("IN_PKGDOWN"), "true")) {
  cat(
    sprintf(
      "<p>For the full vignette see <a href='%s'>%s</a>.</p>",
      url, url
    )
  )
} else {
  htmltools::tags$iframe(
    src = url,
    width = "100%",
    style = "height:100vh; border:none;"
  )
}
```
